channel.title: Block Odds Lab
channel.description: Bitcoin lottery-mining odds, Bitaxe and NerdMiner calculators, and practical solo mining guides.

item.title: Bitcoin Lottery Mining Starter Kit
item.description: A practical setup path for small Bitcoin lottery miners: odds first, then power, cooling, measurement, pool setup, and sane upgrade decisions.

item.title: Bitaxe Gamma Odds Calculator
item.description: Bitaxe Gamma hashrate, watts, yearly Bitcoin block odds, power cost, and whether another Gamma meaningfully moves the needle.

item.title: Block Odds Calculator FAQ Update
item.description: Updated block odds calculator guide with clearer FAQ answers for Bitcoin solo mining odds, expected time, and small-miner block probability.

item.title: Bitaxe Odds Calculator FAQ Update
item.description: Updated Bitaxe odds calculator guide with clearer answers for Bitaxe block odds, tuning tradeoffs, and whether another board moves the needle.

item.title: Bitcoin Lottery Mining Weekend Challenge
item.description: A shareable weekend prompt for Bitaxe, NerdMiner, and small solo miners to run odds before buying, tuning, or posting upgrade claims.

item.title: Bitcoin Mining Difficulty Explained
item.description: Updated guide explaining why difficulty retargets make old Bitaxe, NerdMiner, and solo-mining odds screenshots stale.

item.title: Is Bitcoin Lottery Mining Profitable?
item.description: Updated profitability reality check with stronger calculator routes for solo mining and Bitaxe buying decisions.

item.title: Bitcoin Mining Difficulty Tracker
item.description: Track the next Bitcoin difficulty adjustment, remaining blocks, estimated retarget date, and when to rerun solo mining odds.

item.title: Bitcoin Mining Calculator Share Kit
item.description: Copy-ready posts, canonical links, and audience routes for sharing Block Odds Lab in Reddit, Discord, TikTok, Substack, and creator conversations.

item.title: Block Odds Calculator for Bitcoin Solo Mining
item.description: Estimate Bitcoin solo mining odds, expected time to find a block, daily/monthly/yearly chance, expected BTC, power cost, and hardware payback.

item.title: Bitaxe Odds Calculator
item.description: Bitaxe Gamma odds, watts, tuning stability, yearly probability, and upgrade sanity checks.

item.title: NerdMiner Bitcoin Odds
item.description: A beginner-friendly reality check for NerdMiner odds, learning value, desk mining, and Bitcoin lottery mining expectations.
